content:
### S1: Async Cache No Block

Given 100 concurrent metadata fetches with disk cache
When all hit disk cache
Then no tokio thread blocking, all complete in <1s

### S2: Eager Prefetch

Given package A depends on B, B depends on C
When resolver resolves A
Then B metadata fetch starts immediately after A resolves (not after all level-0 complete)

### S3: Tech Platform True Cold <20s

Given tech-platform with 1886 packages, no cache
When jet install runs
Then completes in <20s
